goal: Visit the provided public company website for the competitor candidate and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare Square, Inc. in a competitor landscape.
goal_prompt:
Visit the provided public company website for the competitor candidate and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare Square, Inc. in a competitor landscape.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","company_name","homepage_url","summary","market_category","sector","geography","target_customers","products","differentiators","pricing_signals","evidence_urls"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"company_name":{"type":"string"},"homepage_url":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"market_category":{"type":"string"},"sector":{"type":"string"},"geography":{"type":"string"},"target_customers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"products":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","category","summary"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"category":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"}}}},"differentiators":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"pricing_signals":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"evidence_urls":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.","Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.","Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures."]

{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.
Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.
Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures.

result.summary: Square provides an integrated ecosystem of commerce solutions including software, hardware, and financial services. Its platform is designed to help businesses of all sizes manage payments, sales, staffing, and banking within a single unified system.
result.geography: Global (United States, United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, Japan, Ireland, Spain, France)

products.name: Square Point of Sale
products.summary: A comprehensive POS application that handles payments, digital receipts, inventory, and analytics across various industries.

products.name: Square Hardware
products.summary: A suite of payment processing devices including Square Register, Terminal, Stand, and contactless/chip readers.

products.name: Square Banking
products.summary: Business financial tools including Checking, Savings, and Square Loans, integrated directly with sales data.

products.name: Square Online
products.summary: A website builder that allows businesses to create online stores with automatic sync of items and inventory with their physical POS.

products.name: Square Payroll
products.summary: Full-service payroll software that manages employee payments, tax filings, and benefits integration.

differentiators: Unified ecosystem combining hardware, software, and banking services
No hidden fees or long-term locked-in contracts
Industry-specific specialized POS software (Square for Retail, Square for Restaurants)
Instant access to funds through Square Checking
Highly intuitive user interface designed for fast setup and ease of use
Square AI-powered tools for business automation and insights
pricing_signals: Square Free: $0/month per location with 2.6% + 15¢ in-person processing fee
Square Plus: $49/month per location with 2.5% + 15¢ in-person processing fee
Square Premium: $149/month per location with 2.4% + 15¢ in-person processing fee
Square Pro: Custom pricing for businesses processing over $250k/year
Hardware pricing starts at $59 for Square Reader for contactless and chip
Square Payroll: $35/month base fee + $6/month per person
